name: aicoding-ai-debug-repair-kit
description: Codex skills and CLI assets for AI debug deployment, generic debug operations, and bounded AI repair loops using build/test evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded build/test repair loops for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides deployment, generic debug operations, and bounded AI repair-loop skills plus the airepair CLI asset. The kit avoids flash/reset/halt by default and only accepts PASS from configured test runners.
defaultPrompt: Use ai-debug-kit-deploy to validate the AI Debug Repair Kit in this repository.
Use ai-debug-repair-loop to run a bounded build/test repair loop without flash, reset, commit, or push.
